summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Scorer/Keeper feature for golf app. All core backend APIs working correctly, frontend Live Scorer page fully functional with player tabs, scorecard entry, and live standings. Public leaderboard correctly displays keeper-entered scores.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for non-admin users
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic - correct behavior but different status code

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks on confirm button
ui_bugs.workaround: Dialog opens correctly, form fields work, but confirm button requires force click

passed_tests: Keeper endpoint properly rejects non-admin users
Player tabs display and switching functionality
Admin Panel Live Scorer button for active tournaments
Guest player scores integration with public leaderboard
